reviews.review_title: Good potential just a dead game tho

reviews.review_description:
I got the game for free from Reddit and that nice of you guys and it’s a pretty good game so try it out
Some weird bugs or it crashes don’t know why so 4 stars

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Due to the fact that it's a very early version, any bugs found and reported to support@lasertaglegends.com would be super helpful so we can get them fixed up ASAP.

reviews.review_description: Everyone writing reviews here needs to keep in mind that these are all mostly games in some stage of  development.  It is patently unfair to compare them to million dollar efforts coming out of the BIG publishers that likely just bought one of these games and 'finished' it.  I think this is a great game for it's niche.  Not everyone wants to play complex ultra real blood and guts games.  I like the less complex hunter/killer style of this program a lot.  I can focus on stalking.  I also think it has a lot of promise for future releases.

reviews.review_title: Graphic great the game is boring
reviews.review_description: There's great graphics. But the game itself is boring and not fun, It would be better if the story of the game changed and made it realistic

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, glad you liked the look of the game. We are actively working on a new mode at the moment to enhance the story elements of the game, however it is primarily a multiplayer arena FPS.
